steps.relax_desc: Engal expert ungal velaiyai sariyaaga seivaar

skyline.team_desc: Erode matrum sutruvattarathil sirandha building kattumaanam valhangum team.

services.s1_long_desc: Residential matrum commercial projects-ukkaana end-to-end construction services. Foundation mudhal painting varai ellame quality-aga seiyapadum.
services.s2_long_desc: Pazhaya buildings-ai modern-aga maatrum renovation services. Structural modifications matrum layout optimization-il naangal specialist.
services.s3_long_desc: High-quality modular kitchens matrum wardrobes. Modern design matrum maximum storage space-ukkaana solutions.
services.s4_desc: Heavy-duty steel shed fabrication matrum roofing.
services.s4_long_desc: Industrial sheds matrum UPVC roofing systems. Entha weather conditions-aiyum thaangum robust solutions.

baas.team_desc: Gobi-yil smart home automation matrum motor control-il thalaimai.

services.s1_desc: Glass touch switches for smart homes.

spoken.whatsapp_msg: Hi Surendar J, I am interested in your spoken Hindi classes.
spoken.team_desc: Hindi payirchi-il expert, Tamil pesubavargallukku elithana murai.

kaykar.team_desc: Paathukaappu monitoring matrum networking-il trustable service.

woodzone.team_desc: Tiles matrum furnitures moolam ungal idathai maattrungal.

gv.team_desc: UPVC solutions matrum fabrication-il sirandha sevai.

shine.team_desc: IT infrastructure matrum security-il expert solutions.

thiran.team_desc: Custom software matrum app development-il innovativel solutions.

swaraj.team_desc: Saaral Motors is your trusted partner for high-performance Swaraj tractors and professional maintenance services.

services.s1_analysis: HP Target 630 to 969FE. 2WD & 4WD options. High torque & mileage.
services.s2_desc: Certified technicians moolamaaga maintenance & repair services.
services.s2_analysis: Advanced tools & genuine spares. Engine life-kku regular maintenance.
services.s3_desc: 100% authentic Swaraj spare parts for maximum performance.
services.s3_analysis: FE matrum XT models-kku ready stock. Heavy-duty usage guaranteed.
services.s4_desc: Ungal pudhiya tractor-kku easy finance & comprehensive insurance.
services.s4_analysis: Low interest rates & flexible tenure. Instant documentation.

sunpower.team_desc: Founder & Owner Jc S.R.S. Prabakaran 2002 mudhal Kavindapadi-yil trusted-aana water purification, UPS/battery solutions, matrum solar systems valangi varugirar.
sunpower.whatsapp_msg: Hi Jc S.R.S. Prabakaran, ungaloda Mega Sun Power Equipments services patri therinjikka virumburen.

water_ro.title: R.O Water Purifier Sales & Services
water_ro.desc: Safe-aana, clean-aana matrum healthy drinking water-ai urudhi seiyum premium domestic domestic matrum industrial R.O water purifiers.
water_ro.s1_desc: Multi-stage filtration (RO+UV+UF+TDS control) konda top-tier household R.O water systems.
water_ro.s1_analysis: 99% impurities-ai remove seiyudhu, essential minerals-ai retain seiyudhu matrum low water wastage.
water_ro.s2_desc: Offices, schools, matrum commercial establishments-kku etra high capacity water purification systems.
water_ro.s2_analysis: Custom scale design, fully automatic operations, matrum robust stainless-steel build.
water_ro.s3_desc: Ellaa brands-ukkum timely filter replacements, membrane cleaning, matrum emergency repair sevaigal.
water_ro.s3_analysis: Quick service, original spare parts, matrum Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC) kidaikkum.

power_solar.title: Solar, UPS & Battery Solutions
power_solar.desc: Ungalukku 24/7 thadaiyillaa power backup thara sustainable solar systems matrum reliable UPS/battery configurations.
power_solar.s1_desc: Vivasayam matrum domestic irrigation-kku etra eco-friendly solar powered water pumping systems.
power_solar.s1_analysis: High efficiency solar controllers, zero fuel cost, low maintenance, matrum weather resistant.
power_solar.s2_desc: Automatic dusk-to-dawn sensors matrum bright LED lamps konda all-in-one solar street lighting systems.
power_solar.s2_analysis: LiFePO4 battery inside, high conversion solar panels, smart motion detectors.
power_solar.s3_desc: Electricity bill-ai kuraikka solar grid integration panradhu illa energy independence peruradhu.
power_solar.s3_analysis: Net metering assistance, premium solar panels, intelligent hybrid inverters.
power_solar.s4_desc: Seamless power-kku high performance batteries konda heavy-duty home & commercial UPS systems.

manojsteels.location: 201, Sathy aathani main road, t.n. palayam, Gobichettipalayam
manojsteels.team_desc: Founder & Owner ManojKumar anandhan has been supplying premium building materials, certified TMT bars, quality cement, and building blocks in Gobichettipalayam since 2012.
manojsteels.whatsapp_msg: Hi ManojKumar anandhan, I am interested in Manojsteels building materials.

cement_steel.title: Cement & TMT Steel Supply
cement_steel.desc: IS-certified reinforcement TMT steel bars and high-grade cement for solid foundations.
cement_steel.s1_desc: Authorized dealer of high-strength grade (53 & 43) cement brands for concrete and plastering.
cement_steel.s1_analysis: Excellent binding properties, rapid setting, resistance to cracks and sulfate attack.
cement_steel.s2_desc: Fe 550D / Fe 600 grade corrosion-resistant steel bars for high structural seismic durability.
cement_steel.s2_analysis: High tensile strength, superb bendability, rust protection, and certified quality.
cement_steel.s3_desc: On-time site delivery with our dedicated logistics fleet ensuring uninterrupted construction work.
cement_steel.s3_analysis: Same-day delivery option, safe offloading, and transparent quantity verification.

aggregates_blocks.title: Blue Metal & Building Blocks
aggregates_blocks.desc: High durability concrete solid blocks and premium aggregates for all structural construction.
aggregates_blocks.s1_desc: Quality blue metal gravel in various sizes (6mm, 12mm, 20mm, 40mm) and premium baby chips.
aggregates_blocks.s1_analysis: Crushed granite stone, uniform grading, free from dust, ideal for structural concrete.
aggregates_blocks.s2_desc: High density solid concrete blocks and light-weight hollow blocks with exceptional load-bearing capacity.
aggregates_blocks.s2_analysis: Precise dimensions, high compressive strength, thermal insulation, and low water absorption.
aggregates_blocks.s3_desc: Quality manufactured sand for concrete and plastering as a durable alternative to river sand.
aggregates_blocks.s3_analysis: Zero silt content, uniform grain size, and superior workability for high strength plaster.

mejestic.location: Loc 2, MIN NAGAR, AMALA SCHOOL ROAD, GOBI 638452
mejestic.team_desc: Founder & Lead Photographer K. Arun creative portrait captures, wedding coverage, event portfolios, matrum studio lighting magic-ai 2012-lerundhu Gobichettipalayathula pannitu vararu.
mejestic.whatsapp_msg: Hi K. Arun, enakku Mejestic Studio photography services mela interest iruku.

studio_portraits.title: Studio & Portrait Photography
studio_portraits.desc: Ultra high-resolution indoor portraits, modeling portfolios, baby shoots, matrum passport services.
studio_portraits.s1_desc: Professional portrait sessions customized backdrops matrum beauty lighting konda shoot.
studio_portraits.s1_analysis: Full-frame cameras, pro softbox diffusers, professional retouching included.
studio_portraits.s2_desc: Newborns, toddlers, matrum family reunions-kku absolute fun props-oda creative photoshoot.
studio_portraits.s2_analysis: Safe environment, kids-friendly staff, colorful backgrounds.
studio_portraits.s3_desc: Passport, visa, corporate ID photos biometric rules-kku conform-a instant print.
studio_portraits.s3_analysis: Biometric alignment check, matte/glossy prints, instant digital copy delivery.

events_weddings.title: Weddings & Outdoor Shoots
events_weddings.desc: Cinematic wedding stories, candid couples photoshoots, matrum outdoor fashion coverage.
events_weddings.s1_desc: Wedding moments, raw emotions, matrum guest joy-ai creative-a capture panradhu.
events_weddings.s1_analysis: Dual-photographer coverage, premium portrait lenses, custom-graded digital albums.
events_weddings.s2_desc: Premium 4K video recording, drone aerial coverage, matrum emotional highlights/teasers.
events_weddings.s2_analysis: 4K gimbal stabilization, professional sound recording, drone permit included.
events_weddings.s3_desc: Pre-wedding or post-wedding photoshoots scenic locations-la outdoor couples photoshoot.
events_weddings.s3_analysis: Location scouting, posing guidance, high-end color-grading.

sakthi.team_desc: Arulmigu Sri Ponkaliyamman thunaiyodu ungal household electrical matrum electronics appliances-ai high-quality matrum reliable-aa service seigirom.
sakthi.whatsapp_msg: Hi Sri Sakthi Electricals, ennodaya household appliances-ai service seiya book panna virumburen.
sakthi.all_services_available: âš¡ All Home Electrical & Electronics Services Available ðŸ› ï¸

services.s1_desc: Complete mechanical overhaul, stone alignment, matrum high-performance motor winding.
services.s1_analysis: Speed stability, belt tensioning, matrum stone wear diagnostic testugal. Heavy-duty 100% copper windings.
services.s2_desc: Ceiling, table, and pedestal fans-ukkana coil rewinding, capacitor testing, matrum noise reduction.
services.s2_analysis: High-grade insulation konda precision copper coil rewinding. Vibration-free rotation-kkana dynamic balance testing.
services.s3_desc: Starter relay diagnostics, calibration, contact replacement, matrum overload protection setup.
services.s3_analysis: Contact resistance, magnetic coil current draw, matrum automated trip-switch operation testugal.
services.s4_desc: IGBT replacement, motherboard troubleshooting, coil heating calibration, matrum touch panel fix.
services.s4_analysis: Microprocessor temperature control calibration. Wattage output monitoring matrum electrical leakage checks.
services.s5_desc: Amplifier repair, audio channel troubleshooting, surround sound tuning, matrum hardware optimization.
services.s5_analysis: Frequency response calibration, dual-channel audio isolation, matrum high-fidelity output distortion testugal.
services.s6_desc: Motor carbon brush replacement, coupler repairs, jar blade sharpening, matrum speed control fixes.
services.s6_analysis: High-RPM load profiling. Speed regulator contact checks matrum jar leakage seal replacement.
services.s7_desc: Thermostat testing, heating coil replacement, matrum optimal heating-kkaana inner tank descaling.
services.s7_analysis: Thermal cut-out switches matrum earth leakage detection-kkaana continuity checks.
services.s8_desc: Complete residential wiring, distribution board setup, matrum short-circuit fault isolation.
services.s8_analysis: Phases idaiye load balancing matrum megger use panni insulation resistance testing.
services.s9_desc: Domestic matrum agricultural pumps-kku motor rewinding, bearing replacement, matrum water seal fitting.
services.s9_analysis: Stator coil resistance testing, rotor dynamic balancing, matrum submersible cable joints check.
services.s10_desc: PCB diagnostics, motor belt replacement, drum cleaning, matrum water inlet valve repairs.
services.s10_analysis: Error code diagnostics, spin cycle unbalance detection, matrum pressure switch calibration.
services.s11_desc: Backlight replacement, motherboard servicing, screen issues troubleshooting, matrum power supply fixes.
services.s11_analysis: T-CON board voltage checks, LED strip series current testing, matrum firmware flashing.
services.s12_desc: Magnetron replacement, high voltage transformer diagnostics, matrum touch panel keypad repair.
services.s12_analysis: High-voltage capacitor discharge tests matrum microwave radiation leakage checks.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Thodara please padithu erka
terms.section1_text: Gobi 360-ku ungalai varaverkirom. App-ai payanpaduthuvadhan moolam vidhimuraigalai erka oppukkolgirirkal.
terms.section4_text: Ungal password-ai ragasiyamaga vaitha-iruppadhu ungal poruppu.
terms.section5_text: Vidhimuraigalai eppoludhu vendumanalum maatrum urimai engalukku undu.
terms.declined_msg: App payanpadutha terms accept seiya vendum.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.data_protection_text: Industry-standard encryption payanpaduthi ungal data-vai secure-aga vaikkalaam.
privacy.account_security_text: Ungal mobile en matrum password moolam secure seiyappadugirathu.
privacy.details_contact: Adhika thagavalukku, engal support team-ai {{email}} la contact pannunga.

about.title: About App
about.description: Gobi 360 ungal anaithu home services-kkum ore theervu. Verified experts-udan ungalai inaikkirom.

help.a1: Dashboard-il category select seithu, vibunarai pick seithu, Book Now click seiyavum.

bot.welcome: Vanakkam! Naan ungal OneTouch Guide. Indru ungalukku enna sevai vendum?
